response.step_by_step_log: The song title "Asphodelus" was identified from on-screen text in the top-left corner. A search for "Asphodelus song original artist Japanese and English lyrics" confirmed the original artist is Ceui, known for the opening theme of "Aiyoku no Eustia". The performers are Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata. Lyrics were compiled from multiple sources found in the search. The video contains a musical segment from 00:00 to 02:35, followed by a non-musical dialogue segment from 02:35 until the end.
response.global_summary: The video features a musical performance of the song "Asphodelus" by Hololive talents Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata, followed by a dialogue segment featuring Shishiro Botan.

scenes.description: Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata perform the song "Asphodelus" on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In the depths of the despair I'm trapped in
Please hold me
Buried in the silence
I'm freezing all alone
At the end of the crumbling paradise
A forgotten prayer is echoing
Oh, love that doesn't wither even in the ruling darkness
Awaken, forever

The loneliness that falls infinitely
Please dye it with those fingers
So that this screaming heart
Can learn to love the sadness
That light I haven't seen yet,reference_lyrics_og:
